title: Hymenodictyon floribundum
taxonomy: Hymenodictyon floribundum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Africa and Asia. It belongs to the genus Hymenodictyon, which consists of a few species of plants. The Rubiaceae family is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants, with over 600 genera and more than 13,000 species. Hymenodictyon floribundum is a relatively rare and lesser-known species within the Rubiaceae family.

It has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties.
